meta_title: Same-Day Sick Notes & Fit Notes in Preston | From £69
meta_description: Same-day fit notes, employer letters, insurance reports, DVLA medicals and visa medicals in Fulwood, Preston. Issued promptly by Dr Faizal Secretary. From £69.
hero_h1: Same-Day Sick Notes in Preston — The Paperwork You Need.
hero_sub: Same-day fit notes, employer letters, insurance reports, DVLA medicals and visa medicals in Preston — issued promptly by Dr Faizal Secretary without the usual back-and-forth.
hero_trust: From £69 · Same-Day Issuance · All Medical Reports
intro_quote: You need a fit note. Your NHS GP can't see you for two weeks.
intro_heading: Sick Notes & Medical Reports in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: Fit notes, employer letters, insurance reports, DVLA medicals, visa medicals — Dr Secretary issues medical documentation promptly, after a proper clinical assessment.
intro_para_2: Same-day issuance available for most documents. Simply book an appointment, attend (or join by phone/video), and leave with your documentation.

faqs.question: What medical documents can you issue?
faqs.answer: Fit notes (sick notes), employer letters, insurance reports, DVLA medicals, visa medicals, private sick certificates and more.

faqs.question: How much does a sick note cost?
faqs.answer: A fit note issued during a GP consultation starts from £69. Standalone letters and reports are quoted separately.

faqs.question: Can I get a sick note by telephone or video?
faqs.answer: Yes, for existing patients. The doctor will assess your situation and issue documentation where clinically appropriate.

faqs.question: How quickly can documents be issued?
faqs.answer: In most cases, documentation is issued the same day — either during or immediately after your appointment.
